abstract: Hear from Mandy Chessell, IBM Distinguished Engineer & data governance expert, on managing metadata, compliance, GDPR, data catalogs & governance - and how to become a data driven organization. There will be plenty of time for discussion and a call to action: how you can participate in developing methods to automate data governance across the industry through the ODPi data governance initiative at the Linux Foundation https://www.odpi.org/projects/data-governance-pmc & https://github.com/odpi/data-governance Agenda: - 6:15-6:30pm - Networking - 6:30-7:15pm - Mandy Chessell on Open Metadata & Data Governance - 7:15-7:45pm - Discussion & Q&A & exploration of Secure Engineering Practices Secure Operations Practices Privacy by design - 7:45-8:00pm - Participating in call-for-code - 8:00-8:30pm - Networking
event_title: Open Metadata & Data Governance with Mandy Chessell
title: Open Metadata & Data Governance with Mandy Chessell
